overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Mafia III showing a character walking through a New Orleans-inspired French Quarter district at night. The character traverses covered sidewalks past jazz clubs, crosses a busy intersection, and continues along stone-paved streets with period-appropriate 1960s architecture and vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian gallery with jazz clubs and vintage storefronts

events.description: begins walking under covered sidewalk gallery with overhead lighting
companion character stops and turns back while ego continues forward alone

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through covered sidewalk alongside a companion in a leather jacket

notable_agents.action: companion walking alongside the player character before stopping

entered.detail: overhead covered walkway with metal supports and hanging lights
red brick building with shuttered windows and doorways
1960s era sedans parked along the curb
illuminated neon sign reading CLUB in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a covered sidewalk gallery typical of the French Quarter, with brick buildings on the right and vintage parked cars visible to the left. Warm artificial lighting illuminates the cobblestone path as the character walks alongside a companion who eventually stops and turns back.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk approaching jazz club entrance with neon signage

events.description: approaches large circular illuminated sign for The Jazz Club

agents.ego_description: continuing alone under the gallery, passing pedestrians and approaching the jazz club entrance

entered.detail: large circular neon sign reading The Jazz Club hanging over sidewalk
aged wooden facade with blue shutters and doorways

segments.scene_description: Walking alone now, the character continues under the covered sidewalk as the architecture transitions to weathered wood facades. The large neon sign for The Jazz Club becomes visible ahead, casting blue and orange light on the concrete pavement while sparse traffic moves along the street to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with pedestrian crosswalk and government buildings

events.description: exits covered gallery into open intersection with visible night sky
begins crossing the multi-lane street at the marked crosswalk

agents.ego_description: steps off the curb and crosses the street, navigating between moving vehicles

notable_agents.action: couple waiting at the corner for the traffic light to change

entered.detail: large white stone building with columns and classical architecture
white striped pedestrian crossing across asphalt street
green traffic signal suspended over the intersection

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered walkway, the scene opens into a wide urban intersection under the night sky. The character crosses the asphalt street at the marked crosswalk, passing a couple waiting at the corner, while vintage cars drive through the intersection and a large stone government building dominates the opposite side.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown sidewalk with news stand and stone architecture

events.description: reaches the opposite sidewalk with stone pavement

agents.ego_description: walking along the stone-paved sidewalk past pedestrians and a news stand

notable_agents.action: man sitting on wooden bench reading a newspaper

entered.detail: small kiosk with NEWS STAND signage and newspapers displayed
large cut stone tiles forming the sidewalk surface

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the street, the character walks along a stone-paved sidewalk beside the imposing government building. A news stand sits on the left while pedestrians walk in opposing directions, and a man sits on a bench reading. The architecture features classical stone facades with large windows.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a nocturnal French Quarter district, transitioning from the intimate shelter of covered galleries to the open scale of a civic intersection. It begins on a cobblestone path beneath a sidewalk gallery, moving past brick buildings and vintage cars as a companion falls behind. As the character continues alone, the architecture shifts to weathered wood facades and the environment is bathed in the blue and orange glow of a neon jazz club sign. The scene then opens as the character emerges from the walkway to cross a wide asphalt intersection, passing waiting pedestrians and moving traffic toward a massive stone government building. Finally, the camera follows the character along a stone-paved sidewalk beside the imposing classical facade, passing a newsstand and seated locals under the night sky.
